Our genesis

The story behind your ritual

Ancient wisdom, modern purity. Beauty drawn from nature.

Scroll to explore
The philosophy

Beauty should flow from nature, never forced, only revealed.

Cleanse Ayurveda is rooted in the belief that beauty flows from nature. Every formula is crafted with sacred intention, shaped by ancient Ayurvedic wisdom and the Himalayan foothills where it was born, then refined for the modern self-care ritual.

What we stand for

Four principles in every bottle

Pure botanicals

Cold-pressed oils, herbal extracts and nothing synthetic. Every ingredient earns its place.

Ancient wisdom

Formulas shaped by five thousand years of Ayurvedic practice and Himalayan tradition.

Modern science

Time-tested rituals, validated and refined with contemporary, clinically-minded research.

Sacred ritual

Skincare slowed down, a daily ceremony of intention, presence and care.

Our heritage

Born in the Himalayan foothills

Where the air runs clean and the herbs grow wild, Ayurveda was born. We honour that lineage with formulas that are pure, potent and profoundly effective, harmonising nature and science for those who seek authentic beauty.

5,000+years of Ayurvedic heritage
100%natural ingredients
0synthetic additives
12botanical actives

Pure nature,
timeless beauty.

Crafted with sacred intention. Built on Ayurvedic wisdom, not trends. Each formula functions with purpose, nothing artificial. Pure in essence, deliberate in potency, rituals for those seeking true wellness.

No synthetics. No compromises. Just formulas perfected over millennia. Indifferent to fads, untouched by chemicals. Botanical in source, sacred in tradition. A system for those who honor their skin.

Our journey

From the foothills to your ritual

01

The source

High in the Himalayan foothills, where the air runs clean and the herbs grow wild, Ayurveda was born.

02

The craft

We partner with growers who honour the land, harvesting each botanical at its peak of potency.

03

The formula

Every blend is composed slowly, balancing ancient tradition with modern, considered refinement.

04

The ritual

What reaches you is more than a product. It is a daily ceremony for your skin and your self.

“We aren’t merely selling bottles; we are delivering a clinically-backed path to purity.”
Cleanse Ayurveda

Join Our Wellness Journey

Receive exclusive rituals, new arrivals, and ancient beauty secrets.

No spam, Just pure Ayurvedic wisdom delivered to your inbox
